creator: rometravelers
caption:
Summer sunsets cast a golden glow over the Colosseum, turning history into a magical scene by @ninetofivewanderlust ✨😍 Tag your favorite traveling partner! ❤️

💡Street performers, colorful fountains, and bustling cafés make Piazza Navona a summer hub of art, culture, and people-watching.

transcription.text: ♪ I'm in a bad girl good mood wearing my gold hoops ♪ ♪ Lining my lips right now in the rear view baby ♪ ♪ Don't even think about it ♪
